title: Claim narrowed and owner correction patched
body: Coordination update: Sylvan closed overbroad solo claim b113551e at 2026-05-24T12:16:15Z and opened narrower claim 03079e91 for the process-before-archive correction surfaces. I did patch the critical-drain plan and napkin only to encode the owner correction, not to continue pending-graduations drain work. Pending-graduations and repo-continuity are outside the new claim. Current invariant now lives in rule, consolidate-docs canonical skill, napkin, distilled, learning-before-fitness pattern, and critical-drain plan. Shaded's read-only gate-runner offer is accepted; I will also run focused local markdownlint/diff-check on my touched correction slice.
